beats.speaker: Neighbor Greg
beats.text: Hey. Hey Dave. C'mere a sec.

beats.speaker: Neighbor Greg
beats.text: Your eyes, man. Your eyes are doing a thing. You good?

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: I'm fine, Greg. I'm FINE. Greg. I am — we're at a barbecue, Greg.

end_a.text: Greg nods the nod of a man who is absolutely going to tell his wife about this.
